analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov announces that Russia and Serbia will sign an intergovernmental agreement to cooperate against terrorism, providing a legal framework for practical projects. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no criticism of the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): Implicitly fits—showcases non-Western bilateral cooperation and institutionalization of ties outside Western frameworks, aligning with Russia promoting multilateral, sovereignty-based cooperation. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): Yes—frames Russia as a constructive, reliable partner helping Serbia with security cooperation and practical projects. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): No performance/achievement claim. RU6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: RU2 and RU3 are promoted.
